chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the "deaths per year" column, the value 194,000 appears in both 1995-2000 and 2000-2005. Therefore, the period 2000-2005 had the same number of deaths as the previous period.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question refers specifically to “the previous year,” but the dataset reports “deaths per year” averaged over 5-year periods, not individual years. Because there are no single-year entries to compare, the table does not identify any period that has the same number of deaths as “the previous year.” Therefore, returning “null” correctly reflects that no specific period can be named based on the granularity of the provided data.
